description: Perform a Market Basket Analysis on the 'Groceries' dataset using the R 'arules' and 'arulesViz' packages to identify cross-selling opportunities. Save the top 20 most frequent items with their names and frequencies to /home/ga/RProjects/output/item_frequencies.csv. Generate association rules using the Apriori algorithm with support = 0.001 and confidence = 0.5. Sort these rules by lift in descending order and export the top 50 rules to /home/ga/RProjects/output/top_association_rules.csv. Create a subset of rules where 'whole milk' is the consequent and save them to /home/ga/RProjects/output/wholemilk_rules.csv. Generate a network graph visualization of the top 50 rules and save it to /home/ga/RProjects/output/rules_network.png. Write the analysis code in /home/ga/RProjects/market_basket_analysis.R.
